overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in a red jacket walking through a lush meadow with tall grass, wildflowers, and scattered rocks. The character explores a natural landscape featuring weeping willow trees and autumn-colored foliage under a partly cloudy sky, with birds flying overhead.

trees with reddish-brown autumn leaves scattered across the meadow
dense field of tall green grass with scattered purple wildflowers
group of weeping willow trees with long drooping branches in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open meadow with tall grass and purple wildflowers. Large rock formations sit to the left while autumn-colored trees dot the right side of the frame. In the distance, weeping willow trees mark the path forward under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: flock of birds enters the sky and begins circling overhead

agents.ego_description: walking past weeping willow trees while birds fly overhead

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying in circular patterns high above the meadow

entered.detail: small cluster of rocks visible in the distance to the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes through an area dominated by weeping willow trees with long drooping branches. Birds appear in the sky, circling overhead. The large rock formation recedes to the left rear as the meadow opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky outcrop approach with small creek

events.description: camera tilts upward to observe the birds flying directly overhead
camera returns to level position as character approaches rocky outcrop

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at birds flying overhead, then continuing toward rocky terrain

notable_agents.action: birds flying directly overhead in scattered formation against the clouds

entered.detail: large rocky hill formation with boulders and sparse vegetation ahead
narrow stream with rocky banks running through the grass on the right

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on birds flying against the cloudy sky, then returns to level as the character approaches a large rocky outcrop. A small creek becomes visible on the right side of the frame as the character continues walking through the grassy terrain toward the rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant meadow that transitions from open grasslands into a sheltered grove of willow trees and rocky terrain. It begins with the character walking through tall grass and purple wildflowers, flanked by large rock formations to the left and autumn-colored trees to the right. As the character advances, the landscape shifts into a dense area of weeping willows with long drooping branches while birds begin to circle in the sky above. The camera then tilts upward to track the birds against the cloudy sky before returning to level as the meadow opens up once more. Finally, the scene expands to reveal a small creek on the right as the character approaches a large rocky outcrop.
